summary: Tested UX Simplification features for Estimate Analysis page. All 33 backend tests pass. Frontend UI tests pass for upload dialog (no schedule selector, region-first layout, localStorage persistence, label changes between US/CA), Match Debug page (schedule selector retained for debug tool, inferred_logic section), and EstimateDetailPage (driving conditions toggle for US estimates).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/estimates/{id}/reanalyze endpoint exists and accepts POST
Backend: Reanalyze with SCHEDULE_1 returns 200 with estimate, items, summary
Backend: Reanalyze with SCHEDULE_2 updates estimate's schedule_code
Backend: Reanalyze persists schedule_code to database
Backend: Reanalyze returns updated items with analysis fields
Backend: Reanalyze requires authentication (401)
Backend: Debug endpoint returns inferred_logic object
Backend: inferred_logic has default_schedule_applied, user_selected_schedule, logic fields
Backend: inferred_logic.default_schedule_applied = SCHEDULE_1 when using SCHEDULE_1
Backend: inferred_logic.user_selected_schedule = SCHEDULE_2 when user selects SCHEDULE_2
Backend: Debug match works with region_code, schedule_code, current_mileage params
Backend: CA region analysis still works correctly (km units)
Backend: All 19 region feature tests pass (region-profiles, supported-vehicles, debug/match)
Frontend: Upload dialog has Region selector at top
Frontend: Upload dialog has NO schedule selector (removed as expected)
Frontend: Region dropdown shows 'Canada' and 'United States'
Frontend: US region shows 'Current Mileage' label with 'e.g. 42,000' placeholder
Frontend: CA region shows 'Current Odometer' label with 'e.g. 65,000' placeholder
Frontend: Region persists to localStorage ('servicecheck_region' key)
Frontend: Match Debug page has region selector
Frontend: Match Debug page shows schedule selector when US is selected
Frontend: Match Debug page shows 'Normal driving' / 'Severe conditions' options
Frontend: Match Debug results show Inferred Logic section with default_schedule_applied, user_selected_schedule, logic
Frontend: Match Debug results show Verdict section with due_status, schedule_used, interval
Frontend: Match Debug results show Rule Trace section
critical_code_review_comments: EstimatesPage.js correctly implements region-first layout with no schedule selector
EstimatesPage.js correctly persists region to localStorage on change
EstimatesPage.js correctly changes mileage label/placeholder based on region
EstimateDetailPage.js correctly shows driving conditions toggle only for US estimates
MatchDebugPage.js correctly retains schedule selector for debug purposes
estimates.py reanalyze endpoint correctly updates schedule_code in database
estimates.py debug endpoint correctly returns inferred_logic object
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and estimate
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX Simplification features fully tested. Key changes: 1) Upload dialog no longer has schedule selector - schedule defaults to SCHEDULE_1, 2) Region selector at top with localStorage persistence, 3) Mileage label changes between 'Current Mileage' (US) and 'Current Odometer' (CA), 4) Driving conditions toggle only appears on EstimateDetailPage for US estimates, 5) Match Debug page retains schedule selector as it's a debug tool, 6) Debug endpoint returns inferred_logic object with default_schedule_applied, user_selected_schedule, logic fields. The existing estimate (9e22270d-ea11-45dc-aebe-c91e044db16b) is an older format without region_code, so driving conditions toggle won't appear for it.
